title: AAG Optimized
description: Carefully selected and extensively tested, combination of different mods in this modpack will surely help to improve the performance and resulting in more fps.
body:
AAG Optimized modpack focusses mainly on optimizing the performance of Minecraft on fabric.

All the mods included in this modpack are carefully selected and extensively tested.
Although, this modpack will help in performance and fps boost in most of the cases, but in some cases if the hardware you are running on is too old or incompatible, then it may not give you desired results.
There have been many cases where the fps of users was boosted from 60+ to 200+, so you can be assured of a huge performance increase by installing this modpack.

**NOTE**
This modpack includes nvidium mod which supports only Nvidia GPUs (16xx onwards). If you do not have a Nvidia GPU, then this mod will not be used automatically.

**Supported Version**
1.20.1
